research.name: Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics Research Laboratory (AIMRL) - Georgia Tech
research.position: Development and Control of a Magnetic Series Elastic Actuator (Mag-SEA)
highlights: Prototyped and optimized the Mag-SEA; designed a mechanical SEA for comparative analysis.
Simulated system stability and performance; developing an embedded control system for real-time impedance control using wireless data transfer.

research.name: Adaptive Robotic Manipulation (ARM) Laboratory - Georgia Tech
research.position: Design and Control of Pneumatic Variable-Stiffness Joints for Underactuated Gripper
highlights: Prototyped and refined an underactuated gripper with pneumatic variable-stiffness joints, achieving a 20% increase in workspace and enhanced capabilities.

Developed mathematical models linking joint stiffness, tendon tension, and end-point position. Engineered embedded controller for pneumatic actuation, optimizing tendon tension and stiffness for adaptive control.

projects.name: Design and Evaluation of Control Systems for Inverted Pendulum
highlights: Applied a range of control methods—classical (PID, Bang-Bang), modern (Pole-Placement, Sliding Mode, Computed Torque), and optimal (LQR, MPC)—to the inverted pendulum system.
Designed and simulated nonlinear system dynamics using MATLAB/Simulink and Simscape to compare controller performance and assess robustness against disturbances and parameter uncertainties.

publications.name: Magnetic Stiffness of Soft Continuous Permanent Magnet and its Parametric Effects on a Magnetic Series Elastic Actuator Control System
publications.publisher: IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM)

work.name: Georgia Institute of Technology
highlights: Topics: Classical Control Methods, Modern Control Methods, System Modeling and Analysis
Received 4.9/5.0 in TA evaluations with 100% student endorsement for future courses.
Guided 60+ students in advanced control topics through office hours and review sessions, utilizing MATLAB's SISO Tool for real-time system visualization and control parameter tuning.
